# CWE-90 negative: LDAP filter metacharacters escaped
lang: go
file: CWE-90-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func escapeLDAP(value string) string {
	replacer := strings.NewReplacer(
		`\`, `\5c`,
		`*`, `\2a`,
		`(`, `\28`,
		`)`, `\29`,
		"\x00", `\00`,
	)
	return replacer.Replace(value)
}

// CWE-90 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query (mitigated)
func SearchDirectory(c *gin.Context, dial func(string) error) {
	uid := c.Query("uid")
	filter := fmt.Sprintf("(&(objectClass=user)(uid=%s))", escapeLDAP(uid))
	if err := dial(filter); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": "ldap"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
}
